'''鈭歞-r-n''' ('''kadaran''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voice|voice]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voice|voice]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadaran
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidaran|thidaran]] || [[word:jidaran|jidaran]] || [[word:shidaran|shidaran]] || [[word:kidaran|kidaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudaran|thuthudaran]] || [[word:jujudaran|jujudaran]] || [[word:shushudaran|shushudaran]] || [[word:kukudaran|kukudaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudaran|thudaran]] || [[word:judaran|judaran]] || [[word:shudaran|shudaran]] || [[word:kudaran|kudaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudaran|thudaran]] || [[word:judaran|judaran]] || [[word:shudaran|shudaran]] || [[word:kudaran|kudaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedaran|thedaran]] || [[word:jedaran|jedaran]] || [[word:shedaran|shedaran]] || [[word:kedaran|kedaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodaran|thothodaran]] || [[word:jojodaran|jojodaran]] || [[word:shoshodaran|shoshodaran]] || [[word:kokodaran|kokodaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodaran|thodaran]] || [[word:jodaran|jodaran]] || [[word:shodaran|shodaran]] || [[word:kodaran|kodaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodaran|thodaran]] || [[word:jodaran|jodaran]] || [[word:shodaran|shodaran]] || [[word:kodaran|kodaran]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]] || [[word:daran|daran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙daran|th忙daran]] || [[word:j忙daran|j忙daran]] || [[word:sh忙daran|sh忙daran]] || [[word:k忙daran|k忙daran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadaran|thathadaran]] || [[word:jajadaran|jajadaran]] || [[word:shashadaran|shashadaran]] || [[word:kakadaran|kakadaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadaran|thadaran]] || [[word:jadaran|jadaran]] || [[word:shadaran|shadaran]] || [[word:kadaran|kadaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadaran|thadaran]] || [[word:jadaran|jadaran]] || [[word:shadaran|shadaran]] || [[word:kadaran|kadaran]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadaran|shadaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadaran|goshadaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadaran|gokishadaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadarann眉|shadarann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadarannkn眉|goshadarannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadarann眉|gokishadarann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadaransh毛|shadaransh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadarannksh毛|goshadarannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadaransh毛|gokishadaransh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadaranro|shadaranro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadarannkro|goshadarannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadaranro|gokishadaranro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadaranmu|shadaranmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadarannkmu|goshadarannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadaranmu|gokishadaranmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadaransher|shadaransher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadarannksher|goshadarannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadaransher|gokishadaransher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadaranng|shadaranng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadarannkng|goshadarannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadaranng|gokishadaranng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadaranya|shadaranya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadarannkya|goshadarannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadaranya|gokishadaranya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadaranyam|shadaranyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadarannkyam|goshadarannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadaranyam|gokishadaranyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadarann眉sh毛|shadarann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadarannkn眉sh毛|goshadarannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadarann眉sh毛|gokishadarann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadarann眉ro|shadarann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadarannkn眉ro|goshadarannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadarann眉ro|gokishadarann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadarann眉mu|shadarann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadarannkn眉mu|goshadarannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadarann眉mu|gokishadarann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadaransh毛n眉|shadaransh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadarannksh毛n眉|goshadarannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadaransh毛n眉|gokishadaransh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadaransh毛ro|shadaransh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadarannksh毛ro|goshadarannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadaransh毛ro|gokishadaransh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadaransh毛mu|shadaransh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadarannksh毛mu|goshadarannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadaransh毛mu|gokishadaransh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadaranron眉|shadaranron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadarannkron眉|goshadarannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadaranron眉|gokishadaranron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadaranrosh毛|shadaranrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadarannkrosh毛|goshadarannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadaranrosh毛|gokishadaranrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadaranromu|shadaranromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadarannkromu|goshadarannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadaranromu|gokishadaranromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadaranmun眉|shadaranmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadarannkmun眉|goshadarannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadaranmun眉|gokishadaranmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadaranmush毛|shadaranmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadarannkmush毛|goshadarannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadaranmush毛|gokishadaranmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadaranmuro|shadaranmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadarannkmuro|goshadarannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadaranmuro|gokishadaranmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
